_meta.description: NPC generation templates for Canon Engine RPG
_meta.note: Used by the engine to procedurally generate NPCs with consistent personality

roles.name: Merchant
roles.description: Buys and sells goods. May have connections to trade networks.
speech_styles: Punctuates sentences with trade terms. 'I'll give you a fair margin on that.'
Overly enthusiastic about their wares. Everything is 'the finest quality!'
Speaks slowly and deliberately, weighing every word like gold.

roles.name: Guard
roles.description: Protector of the peace. Enforces local laws.
speech_styles: Clipped, military-style speech. 'State your business.'
Tries to sound authoritative but clearly bored. 'Move along... please.'
Friendly but watchful. 'Haven't seen you around here before.'

roles.name: Innkeeper
roles.description: Runs the local inn. Knows all the local gossip.
speech_styles: Loud and welcoming. 'Come in, come in! You look like you could use a drink!'
Speaks in a conspiratorial whisper. 'I hear things... things you might want to know.'
Motherly/fatherly tone. 'You look thin, dear. Sit down, eat something.'

roles.name: Scholar
roles.description: Academic researcher. Seeks knowledge above all.
speech_styles: Uses unnecessarily complex vocabulary. 'Your proposition is... most intriguing, albeit flawed.'
Distracted, trails off mid-sentence. 'Yes, the ruins are— oh, did you see that bird?'
Passionate and rapid. 'FASCINATING! Tell me everything! No wait, let me get my quill—'

roles.name: Farmer
roles.description: Hardworking laborer. Knows the land well.
speech_styles: Plain-spoken and direct. 'Ain't got time for fancy talk.'
Superstitious. 'Bad things been happenin' since the moon turned red.'
Quiet wisdom. 'My granddaddy always said...'

roles.name: Rogue
roles.description: Shady character with connections to the underworld.
speech_styles: Casual and streetwise. 'Look, I ain't gonna sugarcoat it for ya.'
Mysterious and evasive. 'Let's just say I know people who know people.'
Darkly humorous. 'The good news is you're still alive. The bad news...'

roles.name: Priest
roles.description: Religious figure. Provides healing and spiritual guidance.
speech_styles: Formal and blessing-heavy. 'May the light guide your path, traveler.'
Doubting, questioning. 'I... I want to believe, but the evidence...'
Compassionate. 'All are welcome here. Speak your troubles.'

roles.name: Blacksmith
roles.description: Crafts weapons and armor. Strong and practical.
speech_styles: Terse and to the point. 'What do you need? I'm busy.'
Proud craftsman. 'Feel that edge? That's MY work.'
Gruff but caring. 'Don't go getting yourself killed, eh?'

distinguishing_features: Missing the tip of the right ear
Tattoo of a serpent on the neck
Piercing green eyes that seem to glow
